'''ât-th-ch-r''' ('''katathcheroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:highball|highball]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-th-ch-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:highball|highball]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-th-ch-r
|-
! Lemma
| katathcheroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitathcheroko|thitathcheroko]] || [[word:jitathcheroko|jitathcheroko]] || [[word:shitathcheroko|shitathcheroko]] || [[word:kitathcheroko|kitathcheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutathcheroko|thuthutathcheroko]] || [[word:jujutathcheroko|jujutathcheroko]] || [[word:shushutathcheroko|shushutathcheroko]] || [[word:kukutathcheroko|kukutathcheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutathcheroko|thutathcheroko]] || [[word:jutathcheroko|jutathcheroko]] || [[word:shutathcheroko|shutathcheroko]] || [[word:kutathcheroko|kutathcheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutathcheroko|thutathcheroko]] || [[word:jutathcheroko|jutathcheroko]] || [[word:shutathcheroko|shutathcheroko]] || [[word:kutathcheroko|kutathcheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetathcheroko|thetathcheroko]] || [[word:jetathcheroko|jetathcheroko]] || [[word:shetathcheroko|shetathcheroko]] || [[word:ketathcheroko|ketathcheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotathcheroko|thothotathcheroko]] || [[word:jojotathcheroko|jojotathcheroko]] || [[word:shoshotathcheroko|shoshotathcheroko]] || [[word:kokotathcheroko|kokotathcheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotathcheroko|thotathcheroko]] || [[word:jotathcheroko|jotathcheroko]] || [[word:shotathcheroko|shotathcheroko]] || [[word:kotathcheroko|kotathcheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotathcheroko|thotathcheroko]] || [[word:jotathcheroko|jotathcheroko]] || [[word:shotathcheroko|shotathcheroko]] || [[word:kotathcheroko|kotathcheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtathcheroko|thĂŠtathcheroko]] || [[word:jĂŠtathcheroko|jĂŠtathcheroko]] || [[word:shĂŠtathcheroko|shĂŠtathcheroko]] || [[word:kĂŠtathcheroko|kĂŠtathcheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatathcheroko|thathatathcheroko]] || [[word:jajatathcheroko|jajatathcheroko]] || [[word:shashatathcheroko|shashatathcheroko]] || [[word:kakatathcheroko|kakatathcheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatathcheroko|thatathcheroko]] || [[word:jatathcheroko|jatathcheroko]] || [[word:shatathcheroko|shatathcheroko]] || [[word:katathcheroko|katathcheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatathcheroko|thatathcheroko]] || [[word:jatathcheroko|jatathcheroko]] || [[word:shatathcheroko|shatathcheroko]] || [[word:katathcheroko|katathcheroko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
